Learning centre categories

The article library is being prepared. These categories will stay in place while the first guides are reviewed for publication.

01

Solar Education

Straightforward guidance about solar equipment, production and system design.

Guides coming later
02

Residential Solar

Planning considerations for household usage, rooftops and future energy needs.

Guides coming later
03

Commercial Solar

Practical information for organizations evaluating solar as a long-term asset.

Guides coming later
04

Agricultural Solar

Solar planning for farms, rural properties, working buildings and ground mounts.

Guides coming later
05

Alberta Programs

Carefully reviewed information about approvals, incentives and financing.

Guides coming later
06

Project Planning

What to expect from initial usage review through installation and activation.

Your next step

Share your electricity usage and property details. We’ll organize the information needed to shape a clear solar proposal.
